EmptyStates.noLeadsDescription: Chua co lead nao. Hay them lead dau tien de bat dau theo doi lich cham soc va lich hen.
EmptyStates.noCampaignsDescription: Chua co chien dich nao. Hay them chien dich khi ban muon so sanh chat luong lead, lich hen da chot va hieu qua nguon.
EmptyStates.noFilteredLeadsTitle: Khong tim thay lead phu hop
EmptyStates.noFilteredLeadsDescription: Khong co lead nao khop voi bo loc hien tai. Hay xoa bo loc hoac dieu chinh tim kiem de mo rong ket qua.
EmptyStates.noRecentLeadsDescription: Lead moi se xuat hien tai day ngay khi duoc tao vao he thong.
EmptyStates.noReportTitle: Chua co du lieu bao cao
EmptyStates.noReportDescription: Khi co hoat dong lead trong tuan, tong ket hieu suat se hien thi tai day.
EmptyStates.noChartDataTitle: Chua co du lieu bieu do
EmptyStates.noChartDataDescription: Hay bat dau ghi nhan lead de mo khoa bieu do xu huong, nguon va pipeline.

Validation.validation.fullNameRequired: Vui long nhap ho ten day du cua lead.
Validation.validation.phoneRequired: Vui long nhap so dien thoai co it nhat 8 chu so.
Validation.validation.emailInvalid: Vui long nhap dia chi email hop le.
Validation.validation.shortTextTooLong: Noi dung nay can ngan hon 120 ky tu.
Validation.validation.notesTooLong: Ghi chu can ngan hon 2000 ky tu.
Validation.validation.selectStatus: Vui long chon trang thai lead.
Validation.validation.honeypotInvalid: Khong the xu ly gui du lieu nay.
Validation.validation.saveLeadFailed: Khong the luu lead luc nay. Vui long thu lai.
Validation.validation.updateLeadFailed: Khong the cap nhat lead luc nay. Vui long thu lai.
Validation.validation.invalidCampaign: Lien ket chien dich nay khong con hop le voi form nay.

LeadForm.pageDescription: Thu thap thong tin lien he, nguon lead va buoc cham soc tiep theo de doi ngu biet can lam gi tiep theo.
LeadForm.detailsDescription: Ghi lai du ng canh de doi ngu co the cham soc nhanh hon, hieu ro nguon lead va day lead toi lich hen.
LeadForm.summaryDescription: Luu lead va chuyen sang trang chi tiet de tiep tuc quan ly cham soc.
LeadForm.contactSectionDescription: Giup doi ngu nhan ra khach hang va lien he lai mot cach tu tin.
LeadForm.leadSectionDescription: Luu lai boi canh de bao cao va buoc cham soc tiep theo huu ich hon.
LeadForm.sourceSectionDescription: Giu attribution sach de chu doanh nghiep thay ro kenh va chien dich nao dang thuc su hieu qua.
LeadForm.followUpSectionDescription: Dat hanh dong tiep theo da hua de hang doi luon dang tin cay.
LeadForm.notesSectionDescription: Them phan hoi, thoi diem, dau hieu ngan sach hoac bat ky thong tin nao huu ich cho viec ban giao.
LeadForm.fullNameHelp: Dung ten ma doi ngu co the nhan ra ngay lap tuc.
LeadForm.phoneHelp: So chinh de goi lai hoac nhan tin cham soc.
LeadForm.emailHelp: Tuy chon, nhung huu ich cho xac nhan va cham soc.
LeadForm.serviceInterestPlaceholder: Tam trang, cham soc da, khoa hoc tieng Anh...
LeadForm.serviceInterestHelp: Khach hang muon dat lich hoac tim hieu dieu gi?
LeadForm.preferredContactTimeLabel: Thoi gian lien he uu tien
LeadForm.preferredContactTimePlaceholder: Buoi chieu trong tuan, sau 6 gio, cuoi tuan...
LeadForm.preferredContactTimeHelp: Tuy chon thoi gian khach hang muon duoc lien he.
LeadForm.sourceHelp: Chon dung nguon de bao cao chien dich co y nghia hon.
LeadForm.campaignHelp: Tuy chon neu ban muon gan lead voi mot chuong trinh hoac nhom quang cao cu the.
LeadForm.statusHelp: Bat dau voi trang thai phu hop nhat voi cuoc tro chuyen hien tai.
LeadForm.followUpHelp: Dat hanh dong tiep theo de hien trong hang doi dashboard.
LeadForm.notesPlaceholder: Boi canh tu cuoc tro chuyen, thoi diem mong muon, dau hieu ngan sach...
LeadForm.notesHelp: Them dau hieu ngan sach, thoi diem mong muon, lo ngai hoac boi canh ban giao.
LeadForm.summaryBody: Mot lead duoc gan nhan ro rang giup chu doanh nghiep hieu kenh nao dang tao ra co hoi dat lich thuc su thay vi chi tang so luong tin nhan.

LeadDetailForm.followUpHelp: Dat moc lien he da hua de lead hien dung trong hang doi cham soc.
LeadDetailForm.notesHelp: Ghi chu ngan gon va thuc te: nhu cau, thoi diem, lo ngai va buoc tiep theo.
LeadDetailForm.success: Da cap nhat lead thanh cong.
LeadDetailForm.error: Khong the cap nhat lead luc nay. Vui long thu lai.

LeadTable.workspaceDescription: Tim kiem, loc va mo ho so lead nhanh de doi ngu hanh dong ma khong mat boi canh.
LeadTable.reviewHint: Mo tung dong de xem thong tin lien he, lich cham soc va ghi chu.
LeadTable.searchPlaceholder: Tim ten, so dien thoai, email, nhu cau

Dashboard.pageDescription: Theo doi lead moi, lich cham soc va lich hen da dat trong cung mot noi.
Dashboard.attentionDescription: Tom tat hanh dong ngan gon de doi ngu biet can lam gi tiep theo ma khong can dao qua toan bo danh sach lead.
Dashboard.recentLeadsDescription: Nhung lead moi vao he thong gan day, du thong tin de biet ai can cham soc tiep theo.
Dashboard.leadsByDayDescription: Goc nhin nhanh ve so luong lead moi tung ngay de chu doanh nghiep nhan ra su thay doi dong luc trong tuan.
Dashboard.leadsBySourceDescription: Xem kenh nao dang dua nhieu lead nhat vao he thong.
Dashboard.statusDistributionDescription: Hieu ro ty trong lead moi, dang xu ly, da dat lich va co nguy co mat.

attention.followUpNeededText: Moi lead doi qua lau deu co nguy co lo mat lich hen hoac tro thanh cuoc tro chuyen lanh.
attention.oldestPendingLabel: Lead cham soc ton dong lau nhat
attention.noOverdueText: Hien tai khong co lead nao qua han cham soc trong hang doi.
attention.suggestedActionAlert: Hay goi hoac nhan tin cho lead qua han lau nhat truoc, sau do don sach phan con lai trong hang doi cham soc qua han truoc khi lead moi tiep tuc do vao.
attention.suggestedActionHealthy: Hang doi cham soc dang on. Hay tap trung chuyen lead moi va lead quan tam thanh lich hen.

totalLeads.label: Tong so lead
totalLeads.hint: Tat ca nhu cau dang duoc theo doi trong workspace nay.

newLeads.label: Lead moi
newLeads.hint: Co hoi moi can duoc lien he nhanh.
newLeads.trend: Bao ve toc do phan hoi dau tien

followUpNeeded.label: Can cham soc
followUpNeeded.hint: Lead den han hom nay hoac da qua han cham soc.

bookedAppointments.label: Lich hen da dat
bookedAppointments.hint: Nhung lead da chuyen thanh lich hen xac nhan.

conversionRate.label: Ty le chuyen doi
conversionRate.hint: Ty le lich hen da dat tren tong so lead dang theo doi.

Dashboard.emptyAttentionTitle: Khong co lead can xu ly gap
Dashboard.emptyAttentionDescription: Hang doi cham soc dang on. Hay tap trung chuyen lead moi va quan tam thanh lich hen.

Reports.pageTitle: Bao cao hieu suat lead hang tuan
Reports.pageDescription: Bao cao kinh doanh ro rang ve luong lead, rui ro cham soc va hieu suat dat lich ngay ca truoc khi co insight do AI tao.
Reports.summaryDescription: Tong ket van hanh ngan gon cho chu doanh nghiep muon thay nhanh dong lead, hieu suat dat lich va rui ro cham soc.
Reports.fullReportTitle: Bao cao hieu suat lead hang tuan
Reports.fullReportDescription: Bao cao co quy tac ro rang de demo hom nay, san sang de nang cap thanh bao cao AI o phien ban sau.
Reports.futureAi: Bao cao do AI tao se co trong phien ban sau.
Reports.fallbackBestSource: Chua co nguon dan dau ro rang. Hay tiep tuc thu nghiem cac kenh mang ve nhung nhu cau chat luong.
Reports.fallbackFollowUpRisk: Tuan nay chua ghi nhan rui ro cham soc dang lo ngai.
Reports.fallbackBookingPerformance: Tuan nay chua ghi nhan lich hen nao duoc dat.
Reports.bookingPerformanceWithCount: Tuan nay da ghi nhan {count} lich hen duoc dat.
Reports.fallbackSuggestedAction: Hay de y cac phan hoi cham va bao ve toc do cham soc.
Reports.fallbackSuggestedActionDetailed: Tang toc do phan hoi cho lead moi va ra soat nhung giai doan lead dang bi dung lai.
Reports.fallbackReadout: Hay uu tien toc do phan hoi va kenh tot nhat trong khi cac lead qua han cham soc van con co the cuu lai.
